zh.lifeSummary: 當Jacob Speck於1560年出生在瑞士時，他的父親Michael Speck30歲，母親Anna Spillman23歲。他和Eva Knoepflin至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jacob Speck于1560年出生在瑞士时，他的父亲Michael Speck30岁，母亲Anna Spillman23岁。他和Eva Knoepflin至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Speck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from Middle High German spec ‘bacon’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a seller of bacon or a pork butcher, or a nickname for a fat person.
German: topographic name from Middle High German speck(e) ‘log bridge or road’.
German: habitational name from any of the places called Speck, Specke, or Specken.

variants.name: Speake
meanings: habitational name from Speke in Lancashire, named in Old English with spēc ‘small branch, twig’.

nickname from Middle English spek(e), spec (Old French espech(e), espek). The name was interchangeable with the synonymous name Speight . Espec or Espek is recorded as a nickname in Normandy from 1036.

variants.name: Speckmann
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a path through a swampy area, Middle Low German specke. In some cases it may have been a metonymic occupational name for someone who constructed such paths, usually from brush, soil, or the like.
North German: habitational name for someone from any of the places called Specke or Specken in northern Germany and Holland.
German: variant of Speck 1, with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Jacob
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

historicEvents.description: All European peace treaty formally accepts Switzerland as an independent nation.

en.lifeSummary: When Jacob Speck was born in 1560, in Switzerland, his father, Michael Speck, was 30 and his mother, Anna Spillman, was 23. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Eva Knoepflin.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jacob Speck est né en 1560, à Suisse, son père, Michael Speck, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anna Spillman, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Eva Knoepflin.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jacob Speck 1560 in Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Michael Speck 30 und seine Mutter Anna Spillman 23. Er hatte mit Eva Knoepflin mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jacob Speck è nato il nel 1560 nel Svizzera, il suo padre, Michael Speck, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Anna Spillman, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Eva Knoepflin.

ja.lifeSummary: Jacob Speckが1560年にスイスで生まれた時，父Michael Speckは30歳，母Anna Spillmanは23歳であった。彼はEva Knoepflinとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Jacob Speck(이)가 1560년 스위스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Michael Speck(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Spillman(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Eva Knoepflin(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jacob Speck nasceu em 1560, em Suiça, seu pai, Michael Speck, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anna Spillman, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Eva Knoepflin.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jacob Speck родился в 1560 г. в местности Швейцария, его отцу по имени Michael Speck было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Spillman, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Eva Knoepflin.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jacob Speck nació en 1560, en Suiza, su papá, Michael Speck, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anna Spillman, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Eva Knoepflin.
